tests.core_bug_regression: TestContentStorySeeder_WritesRealLanguage — the guard the milestone lacked: before M241 no test asserted the seeded jobsimulation.sessions.language column carries cs.Language, so reverting the write to the hard-coded 'english' passed EVERY Go suite. The new test resolves the column by NAME, asserts language == the pin's real language, a valid non-blank label, AND that the set spans BOTH languages (can't pass vacuously). Mutation-verified RED against the revert, GREEN restored. This is the exact defect v2.6 'sound check' kills.

notes: Fourth of the v2.6 post-barrier fix fan-out (content-stories language), serial after M240 (shares stack-seeding + the re-capture). A clean complete section close — all 5 sections landed + 3 harden passes mutation-verified every gate and closed the core-bug write-side gap (the exact defect v2.6 'sound check' kills: the seeder hard-coded 'english' and no test caught it). The close found 1 doc fix (a stale denominator) + recorded 2 adversarial scenarios (both handled). PII discipline: customer content never entered agent context; scrubbed fixtures only; values-blind captures; assertions are STRUCTURE/PRESENCE/language-LABEL only, never a translated value (P2 copy-immunity). 0 platform-repo edits.
